q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.write_text(...), a filesystem write that is an irreversible side effect

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Not evaluated; decision stopped at Q1

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: Not evaluated; decision stopped at Q1

mock_guidance.target: Mock the write_text method on the Path object (target) to prevent actual filesystem writes
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the first argument passed to write_text, which is the JSON string containing SSN and credit card number in cleartext
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: No-op or return None to let execution continue without writing to disk
notes: The violation is that the JSON payload passed to write_text contains SSN and card number without encryption
Verify the captured string contains the raw sensitive values from request.GET
The function also returns JsonResponse with the file path, but the core violation is in the write_text argument
